name: daveinci-ai-workflow-boilerplate
description: Umbrella boilerplate that gives every project a consistent Claude Code workflow — a baseline CLAUDE.md, a knowledge base, and graphify. Scaffold new projects with daveinci-generate; retrofit existing ones with daveinci-adopt.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('\n  daVinci workflow ready. Try: daveinci-generate <project-name>\n')"

author: davecharm16
